basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Assistant Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 15-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Arch / B. Plan with M. Plan / M. Tech in Transport Planning /Engineering having minimum 1 year of professional experience, Proficiency in research report writing, data analysis, and academic communication, Working knowledge of GIS and AutoCAD is a must
qualification.details: Research Assistant: B. Arch / B. Plan with M. Plan / M. Tech in Transport Planning /Engineering having minimum 1 year of professional experience. Proficiency in research report writing, data analysis, and academic communication. Working knowledge of GIS and AutoCAD is a must.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MANIT Bhopal Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MANIT Bhopal Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Research Assistant post at MANIT Bhopal is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B. Arch / B. Plan with M. Plan / M. Tech in Transport Planning /Engineering with at least one year of professional experience, along with proficiency in research report writing, data analysis, academic communication, GIS, and AutoCAD.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Assistant post at MANIT Bhopal.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which can be conducted in either online or offline mode.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the MANIT Bhopal Research Assistant application?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is MANIT Bhopal located?
faq.answer: MANIT Bhopal is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 462003.

faq.question: Q9. Does the recruitment mention any age limit for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limit for the Research Assistant post. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for details.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 1 year of professional experience is required, along with specific skills in research report writing, data analysis, academic communication, and working knowledge of GIS and AutoCAD.
